
### simple CPU 

![](/pipeline/texfig/single-cycle-cpu-simple-cpu.figure.svg)


### running instructions 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/pipeline/texfig/single-cycle-cpu-running-instructions.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/single-cycle-cpu-running-instructions.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/pipeline/texfig/single-cycle-cpu-running-instructions.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}


:::
